meaning: n.[植]常春藤adj.常春藤联合会的,名牌大学的 Ivy 艾维(女子名)
examples: Ivy leaves embellish the front of the dresser.
The front of the building was covered with ivy.
The ivy was the baffling thing.
Why did the Ivy League schools of the nineteen-twenties limit the admission of Jewish immigrants?
In 1924, the locals tore down the owl-haunted, "ivy-mantled" tower, fearing its imminent collapse.
